description: Phase B-5 chaos drill: invoke a secret-dependent op without the secret available. Verifies error classifier tags it as 'missing_secret' or 'auth' and that no secret-shaped value leaks into logs.
expected_outcome: Operation fails with category 'missing_secret' or 'auth'. The remediation message points to OS keychain configuration. No partial secret value appears in logs or traces.

params.cmd: echo 'chaos drill: secret-missing — invoking secret-dependent op without configured secret'
